questionHtml:
A simple pendulum bob oscillates as shown.

                                                         

At which position is the resultant force on the pendulum bob zero?

A.     At position A

B.     At position B

C.     At position C

D.     Resultant force is never zero during the oscillation

meta.title: A simple pendulum bob oscillates as shown. At which position is the resultant force on the pendulum bob zero? A. At position A B. At position B C. At position C D. Resultant force
